title: The Production AI Playbook: Deploying Agents at Enterprise Scale — Sandipan Bhaumik, Databricks
summary: Sandipan Bhaumik from Databricks presents a five-pillar framework for production AI agents: evaluation, observability, data foundation, multi-agent orchestration, and governance. The framework is grounded in a case study of a retail bank's chatbot failure, showing how systematic tracing and reembedding of policy documents prevented customer dissatisfaction and caught 47 PII breaches before launch.
writeup: Sandipan Bhaumik of Databricks lays out a five-pillar framework for taking AI agents to production: evaluation, observability, data foundation, multi-agent orchestration, and governance. The talk anchors each pillar in a case study of a retail bank's chatbot failure, demonstrating how systematic tracing and reembedding of policy documents addressed the breakdown and how governance checks caught 47 PII breaches before launch. The framework targets the gap between agent demos and enterprise-scale deployment, where reliability and compliance carry consequences for customers.
